author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: Build a Pythia-70M-equivalent architecture test. Pythia-70M uses GPT-NeoX architecture: 6 layers, 8 heads, d_model=512, MLP dim=2048, vocab=50304, max_seq=2048, rotary embeddings (RoPE), parallel attention+MLP (GPT-NeoX style where attention and MLP run in parallel then add, not sequential). Use untied embedding/unembedding. Test: 10 training steps with AdamW, verify loss decreases.
